title: Snap
description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 7 damage.
Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
upgraded_description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals 10 damage.
Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
notes: Requires Osty to be present. Uses Osty's attack damage instead of player damage. Adds the Retain keyword to a selected card in hand.
